name: First Solar, Inc.
description: First Solar, Inc. is a leading American solar technology company and global provider of comprehensive photovoltaic (PV) solar energy solutions. The company designs, manufactures, and sells PV solar modules that use its advanced thin-film semiconductor technology, which provides a high-performance, lower-carbon alternative to conventional crystalline silicon PV panels. As one of the world's largest solar manufacturers, First Solar is uniquely positioned with a fully integrated domestic supply chain and a commitment to sustainability, offering utility-scale power plant solutions and services that support the global transition to renewable energy.

investment_theses.company_type: Solar Module Manufacturing / US Domestic Supply Chain
